name: Release of guarantee retention
description: Release of guarantee retention in two tranches: 50% at handover (behind the handover right_to_proceed, against the commissioning act reference) and 50% after the 730-day defects-liability period (against the defects-liability clearance act). Each release is a fresh fixed-amount payment drawing down the retention reserve — never a recomputation of immutable historical net. The released amount is supplied at decision time via acceptedValues.release_eur. Building-level scope (zone=BLDG).

evidence.description: Reference to the commissioning act / ZOS — proof that handover was accepted.
Act confirming the absence of warranty remarks — required for the second tranche after the defects-liability period.

checks.description: A release requires an accepted handover.

consequences.description: Fixed tranche of accumulated retention released; no new retention on a release.
Releasing the final tranche closes the contract.
